# turn-into-page

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: Turn into → Page block action: collapse a block and its subtree into a new sub-page, leaving a clickable link in place.
- Web:
  - Contributes: `Editor.TurnInto` → `TurnIntoPageItem`
  - Uses: `infra/endpoints.fetchEndpoint`, `page/editor.BlockEditorAPI`, `page/editor.Editor`, `page/editor.useBlockEditor`, `primitives/row.Row`

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:END -->
